Professional Aluminum Outdoor Banner Frame for Trade Shows & Event Marketing

The Outdoor Banner Frame Large is engineered for professional trade show displays and outdoor marketing events. This durable aluminum frame system holds one or two custom vinyl banners and features quick-assembly construction for easy setup at any venue.

The complete display kit includes heavy-duty bungee cords for secure banner attachment, ground stakes for outdoor stability, and a convenient nylon carrying case for transportation between events. The frame accommodates full-color 33" x 94" vinyl banners printed with your custom graphics.

Perfect for trade shows, outdoor exhibitions, promotional events, and temporary advertising displays where professional presentation and portability are essential.

Professional Display Features

  • Quick-assembly aluminum frame construction
  • Holds one or two 33" x 94" vinyl banners
  • Heavy-duty bungee cord attachment system
  • Ground stakes for outdoor stability
  • Nylon carrying case included
  • Full-color custom banner printing
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Outdoor Banner Frame Material for Professional Display Applications

We use premium 13 oz vinyl banner material specifically designed for outdoor banner frame applications. This commercial-grade material is rated for both indoor and outdoor use, providing excellent durability for trade shows and outdoor events.

The heavy-weight vinyl construction ensures your banners maintain professional appearance even in outdoor conditions, while remaining flexible enough for easy attachment to the frame system.

13 oz Vinyl Banner Specifications

  • Commercial-grade 13 oz vinyl construction
  • Indoor and outdoor rated material
  • Weather-resistant for outdoor displays
  • Flexible for easy frame attachment
  • Professional print quality surface

Size Variance Information

Exact banner sizes cannot be guaranteed due to vinyl being a temperature-sensitive material. Some fluctuation may occur during printing, finishing, and exposure to climate conditions. Our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot. For precision applications, please contact Customer Service to discuss your specific requirements.

Request a sample packet of materials to evaluate our vinyl quality before ordering.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Outdoor Banner Frame Assembly & Installation for Professional Display Setup

Your Outdoor Banner Frame Large arrives with all necessary hardware and accessories for professional installation at trade shows, outdoor events, or promotional displays.

Complete Hardware Package

  • Lightweight aluminum frame sections
  • Quick-connect assembly system
  • Heavy-duty bungee cords for banner attachment
  • Ground stakes for outdoor stability
  • Professional nylon carrying case

Setup Instructions

  • Connect aluminum frame sections using quick-assembly system
  • Attach vinyl banners using provided bungee cords
  • Secure frame with ground stakes for outdoor use
  • Transport easily in included carrying case

Display Configuration Options

The frame system accommodates single or double banner configurations, allowing you to create impactful displays for various marketing applications.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Banner Production & Turnaround Times for Outdoor Frames

We provide flexible production time options to meet your trade show and event deadlines. Production times range from two to five business days, allowing you to plan your display timeline accordingly.

2 Business Days Express

Ideal for urgent trade show deadlines or last-minute event requirements. Express production ensures your outdoor banner frame arrives when you need it.

  • Perfect for tight event deadlines
  • Priority production scheduling
  • Same-day rush available in select cases

3 Business Days Standard

Our most popular production option, providing fast turnaround for most custom outdoor banner frame orders at no additional charge.

  • Most popular production timeframe
  • No additional rush charges
  • Suitable for most event planning timelines

5 Business Days Saver

Cost-effective option for events with flexible timelines, offering reduced pricing while maintaining the same quality standards.

  • Budget-friendly production option
  • Same quality standards maintained
  • Ideal for advance event planning

Production Timeline Notes

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Production begins after file upload completion
  • Proof approval required before production starts
  • Emergency same-day service available - contact Customer Service
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Outdoor Banner Frame Payment & Ordering Options

All outdoor banner frames must be paid in full before production begins. We accept multiple payment methods to accommodate your business purchasing requirements.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Visa credit and debit cards
  • MasterCard credit and debit cards
  • American Express cards
  • Discover cards
  • Business checks (must be received before production)

Payment Processing

  • Credit cards charged only after order approval
  • Check orders held until payment clears
  • No charges applied until production authorization

For check payment instructions and processing information, visit our check payment guidelines.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Large Outdoor Banner Frame Delivery

Your outdoor banner frame kit ships via UPS Ground unless you specify expedited shipping to meet your event timeline. All orders include tracking information for delivery monitoring.

Standard Shipping Methods

  • Economy Shipping: 5-10 business days delivery
  • Standard Ground: 3-5 business days delivery
  • Three Day Select: 3 business days delivery
  • Two Day Air: 2 business days delivery
  • Overnight Express: Next business day delivery

Large Item Shipping Guidelines

  • Additional charges apply to oversized banner frame kits
  • Shipping costs determined by weight and destination
  • Tracking number provided after shipment
  • Insurance coverage available for high-value orders

International Shipping

International customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. We accept international labels from USPS and UPS only. Contact Customer Service for international shipping assistance.

Shipping Protection Policy

  • Damaged items must be returned for replacement
  • Lost packages replaced after carrier confirmation
  • Shipping delays beyond our control do not qualify for refunds
  • Carrier terms apply after shipment

For specific shipping questions, contact Customer Service at (320) 391-5300 before placing your order.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Trade Show & Event Uses for Outdoor Banner Frames

The Outdoor Banner Frame Large serves multiple professional display applications, from indoor trade shows to outdoor promotional events and exhibitions.

Trade Show Applications

  • Convention center booth displays
  • Product launch presentations
  • Corporate exhibition stands
  • Industry conference displays
  • Professional trade show backdrops

Outdoor Event Marketing

  • Festival and fair promotional displays
  • Outdoor exhibition booths
  • Sporting event sponsor displays
  • Community event marketing
  • Outdoor product demonstrations

Business Promotional Display

  • Grand opening announcements
  • Seasonal promotion displays
  • Sale and clearance advertising
  • Special event marketing
  • Temporary business signage

Portable Display Advantages

  • Quick setup and breakdown
  • Compact carrying case transport
  • Professional appearance
  • Weather-resistant construction
  • Reusable for multiple events
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vinyl Banner Artwork Requirements for Outdoor Banner Frame Printing

Proper artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality for your outdoor banner frame display. We accept various file formats and provide design assistance when needed.

Preferred File Formats

  • Vector files: .eps with fonts converted to outlines (best quality)
  • High-resolution PDFs: 300 DPI minimum resolution
  • JPEG files: High resolution, 300 DPI or higher
  • TIFF files: Uncompressed, high resolution preferred

Artwork Specifications

  • Banner size: 33" H x 94" W
  • Resolution: 300 DPI minimum for print quality
  • Color mode: CMYK preferred for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleed area: Include 0.25" bleed on all sides

Design Assistance Services

Our professional graphic designers can help create or optimize your banner artwork for outdoor display applications. Design services include layout creation, image enhancement, and print optimization.

Proofing Options

  • Digital Proof: Email proof with order summary for approval
  • Color Match Proof: Physical proof for color-critical projects
  • Production begins only after proof approval

File Upload Guidelines

  • Maximum file size: 60 MB through online system
  • Larger files: Contact Customer Service for transfer instructions
  • Multiple file formats accepted
  • Professional design consultation available

Unsure about your file quality? Our graphic design team will review your artwork and provide recommendations for optimal printing results.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Outdoor Banner Frames with Professional Vinyl Banners

Create professional trade show displays and outdoor marketing presentations with our complete Outdoor Banner Frame Large system. Each kit includes the durable aluminum frame, custom-printed vinyl banners, and all necessary hardware for immediate setup.

Complete Display Package Includes

  • Professional aluminum frame system
  • One or two full-color 33" x 94" vinyl banners
  • Heavy-duty bungee cord attachment system
  • Ground stakes for outdoor stability
  • Professional nylon carrying case
  • Quick-assembly hardware

Why Choose Banners.com for Outdoor Display Frames

Expert Customer Service: Our in-house customer service team includes professional graphic designers ready to assist with your display requirements.

Flexible Production Times: Choose from 2, 3, or 5 business day production schedules to meet your event deadlines.

Premium Materials: We use only the finest aluminum frame materials and commercial-grade 13 oz vinyl for lasting durability.

Live Order Tracking: Monitor your outdoor banner frame production progress with our proprietary tracking system.

Ready to create your professional outdoor display? Upload your artwork or choose from our template library to get started with your custom banner frame system.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Outdoor Banner Frames

What is included with the Outdoor Banner Frame Large?

The complete kit includes the aluminum frame hardware, one or two custom-printed 33" x 94" vinyl banners, heavy-duty bungee cords for attachment, ground stakes for outdoor stability, and a professional nylon carrying case for transport.

How long does it take to set up the outdoor banner frame?

The quick-assembly aluminum frame can be set up in minutes using the included hardware. The bungee cord system makes banner attachment fast and secure for immediate display use.

Can I use this frame for both indoor and outdoor displays?

Yes, the Outdoor Banner Frame Large is designed for both indoor trade show use and outdoor promotional displays. The included ground stakes provide stability for outdoor installations.

What banner material is used for the outdoor frame?

We use premium 13 oz vinyl banner material rated for both indoor and outdoor use. This commercial-grade material provides excellent durability and professional print quality for display applications.

How portable is the outdoor banner frame system?

The aluminum frame disassembles for compact storage in the included nylon carrying case, making it highly portable for travel between trade shows and events.

Can I order replacement banners for my existing frame?

Yes, you can order replacement 33" x 94" vinyl banners separately to update your messaging while reusing the frame hardware for multiple campaigns.

What file formats do you accept for banner artwork?

We accept .eps files with outlined fonts (preferred), high-resolution PDFs, and high-quality .jpg or .tiff files at 300 DPI or higher resolution.

Do you offer design services for outdoor banner frames?

Yes, our professional graphic designers can create custom artwork optimized for your outdoor banner frame display. Design services include layout creation and print optimization.
